report_summary:
**DONE: COUNT Energy Distribution B.V., NL → actual BE — Risk: 2 CLEAR — All sanctions clean; Belgian entity (KBO 0861.333.769), formerly Noahs Ark Chemicals BVBA (2003), acquired by COUNT Group March 2021; directors Jeroen Baaima & Jeffrey Bollebakker (same as COUNT Energy Trading SA, previously cleared); Bhardwaj SDN hits are false positives for unrelated individuals.**

---

## 📋 Research Summary

| Field | Finding |
|---|---|
| **⚠️ Country** | **BELGIUM (BE)** — brief says NL; actual jurisdiction is Belgian KBO |
| **KBO** | **0861.333.769** / VAT: BE0861333769 |
| **Legal form** | Besloten Vennootschap (Belgian B.V.) — note: identical abbreviation to Dutch B.V. |
| **Founded** | October 28, 2003 (as Noahs Ark Chemicals BVBA) |
| **Acquired** | March 2021 by COUNT Energy Trading BV (Netherlands) |
| **Renamed** | January 2022 to COUNT Energy Distribution B.V. |
| **Address** | De Keyserlei 58-60, Bus 19, 2018 Antwerpen, Belgium |
| **Sector** | NACE 46120 — Wholesale agents of fuels, ores, metals and chemicals |

---

### 🛡️ All 8 Workstreams

**1A – Registry:** Belgian KBO confirmed. Three-stage name history: Noahs Ark Chemicals BVBA → Noahs Ark Chemicals B.V. → COUNT Energy Distribution B.V. Most recent gazette filings: March 2026, November 2024.

**2A – Ownership:** COUNT Energy Trading B.V. (Rotterdam, NL) via 4 corporate shareholders (Belgian gazette). Full chain mirrors COUNT Energy Trading SA: COUNT Energy Trading Holding B.V. → Garenne entities → Jeroen Baaima (probable UBO).

**3A – Sanctions (5 lists): ALL CLEAN.** Entity, Baaima, Bollebakker — NO HITS. **BHARDWAJ NAME FLAG — FALSE POSITIVE:** Anuj Bhardwaj (SDGT/terrorism/MEHDI GROUP) and Vikrant Bhardwaj (TCO/human smuggling) are entirely different people from Dr Bharat Bhardwaj of Cambridge (Noahs Ark Chemicals founder, sold 2021).

**4A – Adverse Media:** None. Acquisition news only (positive commercial transaction).

**5A – Litigation:** None found.

**6A – PEP:** Baaima and Bollebakker — NOT PEPs (confirmed from previous COUNT research).

**7A – Trade Risk:** NACE 46120 — standard elevated vigilance for chemicals sector; no sanctioned-country exposure identified.

**8A – Key Actions:**
1. 🔴 **Correct COPAP system** — change country from NL to BE
2. 📄 **Belgian UBO declaration** — confirm 4 shareholder companies
3. 📋 **Product list** — specific chemical portfolio for compliance assessment
